allow:
Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$lines = Get-Content 'C:/Users/Ali/Desktop/renee/preview.html' -Encoding UTF8
\\$before = \\$lines[0..4892]
\\$after  = \\$lines[4942..\(\\$lines.Count-1\)]
\\$before | Set-Content 'C:/Users/Ali/Desktop/renee/preview_before.tmp' -Encoding UTF8
\\$after  | Set-Content 'C:/Users/Ali/Desktop/renee/preview_after.tmp' -Encoding UTF8
Write-Host 'Split done. Before:' \\$before.Count 'After:' \\$after.Count
")
